artPrompt: A grinning goblin gambler mid-leap in a feral town square, flinging a fistful of his own six-sided dice into the firelit air, coins and sparks scattering around him; bonfires bloom flame-orange behind, overturned ballot boxes and torn bunting dissolving into ember-red haze and night-black smoke, the wild toss frozen in a dreamy, tender blur, rendered as soft pastel impressionism — hazy diffuse light, visible chalky texture, gentle gradients, dreamy muted color.
name: Dice Goblin of Whateverville
text:
Whenever Dice Goblin of Whateverville attacks, roll a six-sided die.
1 or 2 — it gets +1/+0 until end of turn.
3 or 4 — create a 1/1 red Voter creature token.
5 — create a Snack token.
6 — do all of the above and shout "house wins!"
flavorText: He brought his own dice. He always brings his own dice.
